]

]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of operational data with interactive visualization for continuous infrastructure control"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, VisualizationInsight, AdjustHVACTemperature, AdjustLighting, AdjustWindowPosition
]

]

instance InfrastructureOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

]

]

]

    base:desc "AECO building integrating static design models with real-time operational data for lifecycle management"
    base:contains IndoorTemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, AirFlowSensor, CO2Sensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingActuator, WindowController, DoorController, IndoorTemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, AirFlowDataTransmitted, CO2DataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, IndoorTemperatureData, HumidityData, AirFlowData, CO2Data, OccupancyData, BuildingControlEngineer, FacilityManager, DTEngineer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the digital twin are sent to Building Control Systems (BCS) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, allowing facility managers to operate physical infrastructure with bidirectional feedback mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points supports integration of custom services and analytics, runtime configuration management enables adjustments without full redeployment, and the DT Framework acts as a central hub coordinating roles for holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, automated transformation via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) to generate deployable artifacts, real-time operational synchronization through continuous data exchange and interactive visualization for Facility Managers, and evolution via modular extension points supporting custom services developed by DT Engineers to address changing operational needs."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is quantified using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess alignment between the digital twin and physical counterpart. Validation processes include systematic checks during model transformation from BIM and runtime operations, with error detection and correction mechanisms ensuring continuous accuracy and reliability of the twin's representations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM is established as a standard solution in the construction industry, yet the absence of standardized integration frameworks for Digital Twins necessitates our framework's development. The solution implements standardized extension points to ensure modular interoperability of custom services and analytics, addressing critical gaps in DT standardization."
]
